languages.text: {n}Поникнув, Эоганн вздыхает.{/n} "Да, Нунциус, пожалуй, и правда история слишком длинная для текущих обстоятельств. Впрочем, довольно лирических отступлений. С тех пор я немало продвинулся в постижении мудрости {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Омниссии{/g}, и провал обеих триасомий останется лишь рядовой неудачей на пути постижения".

traits.locale_text: "Да, друг мой, это повествование длинно и неуместно здесь и сейчас". {n}Эо-ганн со странной тоской созерцает сервочереп.{/n} "Впрочем, довольно лирических отступлений. С тех пор я немало продвинулся вперед в постижении мудрости {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Омниссии{/g}, и рано или поздно осуществлю свой опус магнум".
traits.speaker: EogannCompanion

languages.text: {n}His energy flagging, Eogunn sighs.{/n} "Yes, Nuncius, perhaps the story is indeed too long for our current circumstances. But enough of the lyrical digressions. I have since made significant progress in understanding the wisdom of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}, and the failure of both triasomia procedures will remain merely another setback on the path to comprehension."
languages.original_text: {n}Поникнув, Эоганн вздыхает.{/n} "Да, Нунциус, пожалуй, и правда история слишком длинная для текущих обстоятельств. Впрочем, довольно лирических отступлений. С тех пор я немало продвинулся в постижении мудрости {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Омниссии{/g}, и провал обеих триасомий останется лишь рядовой неудачей на пути постижения".

I have since made significant progress in understanding the wisdom of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}, and the failure of both triasomia procedures will remain merely another setback on the path to comprehension."

{n}His energy flagging, Eogunn sighs.{/n} "Yes, Nuncius, perhaps the story is indeed too long for our current circumstances. But enough of the lyrical digressions. I have since made significant progress in understanding the wisdom of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}, and the failure of both triasomia procedures will remain merely another setback on the path to comprehension."

{n}His energy flagging, Eogunn sighs.{/n} "Yes, Nuncius, perhaps the story is indeed too long for our current circumstances. But enough of the lyrical digressions. I have since made significant progress in understanding the wisdom of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}, and the failure of both triasomia procedures will remain merely another setback on the path to comprehension."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn seufzt angesichts seiner schwindenden Energie.{/n} "Ja, Nuncius, vielleicht ist die Geschichte angesichts der aktuellen Umstände wirklich zu lang. Aber Schluss mit den lyrischen Exkursen. Ich habe seitdem signifikante Fortschritte hinsichtlich des Verständnisses der Weisheit des {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} erzielt, und das Scheitern der beiden Triasomata-Prozeduren war nur ein Rückschlag auf dem Weg zur Erkenntnis."
languages.original_text: {n}His energy flagging, Eogunn sighs.{/n} "Yes, Nuncius, perhaps the story is indeed too long for our current circumstances. But enough of the lyrical digressions. I have since made significant progress in understanding the wisdom of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}, and the failure of both triasomia procedures will remain merely another setback on the path to comprehension."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn seufzt angesichts seiner schwindenden Energie.{/n} "Ja, Nuncius, vielleicht ist die Geschichte angesichts der aktuellen Umstände wirklich zu lang. Aber Schluss mit den lyrischen Exkursen. Ich habe seitdem signifikante Fortschritte hinsichtlich des Verständnisses der Weisheit des {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} erzielt, und das Scheitern der beiden Triasomata-Prozeduren war nur ein Rückschlag auf dem Weg zur Erkenntnis."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn soupire, perdant soudain son énergie.{/n} « C'est vrai, Nuncius, cette histoire est sans doute trop longue pour être racontée maintenant. Mais trêve de digressions. J'ai depuis appris énormément de choses sur la sagesse de l'{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnimessie{/g}, et l'échec des deux procédures de triasomia ne sera qu'un simple obstacle sur la voie de la compréhension. »
languages.original_text: {n}His energy flagging, Eogunn sighs.{/n} "Yes, Nuncius, perhaps the story is indeed too long for our current circumstances. But enough of the lyrical digressions. I have since made significant progress in understanding the wisdom of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}, and the failure of both triasomia procedures will remain merely another setback on the path to comprehension."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn soupire, perdant soudain son énergie.{/n} « C'est vrai, Nuncius, cette histoire est sans doute trop longue pour être racontée maintenant. Mais trêve de digressions. J'ai depuis appris énormément de choses sur la sagesse de l'{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnimessie{/g}, et l'échec des deux procédures de triasomia ne sera qu'un simple obstacle sur la voie de la compréhension. »

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡的精力明显有所衰减，他轻轻叹息。{/n}“是的，努恩修斯，也许这个故事在当前场景下确实过于冗长了。但闲话到此为止。我已在理解{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}欧姆尼赛亚{/g}的智慧上取得了显著进展，而两次三相体融合实验的失败，不过是认知之路上的一次小小挫折。”
languages.original_text: {n}His energy flagging, Eogunn sighs.{/n} "Yes, Nuncius, perhaps the story is indeed too long for our current circumstances. But enough of the lyrical digressions. I have since made significant progress in understanding the wisdom of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}, and the failure of both triasomia procedures will remain merely another setback on the path to comprehension."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡的精力明显有所衰减，他轻轻叹息。{/n}“是的，努恩修斯，也许这个故事在当前场景下确实过于冗长了。但闲话到此为止。我已在理解{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}欧姆尼赛亚{/g}的智慧上取得了显著进展，而两次三相体融合实验的失败，不过是认知之路上的一次小小挫折。”

languages.text: {n}Eogunn flaquea y suspira.{/n} «Cierto, Nuncius, tal vez la historia sea demasiado larga para las circunstancias actuales. Pero dejémonos de divagaciones. Desde entonces he avanzado considerablemente en mi entendimiento de la sabiduría del {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}, y el fracaso de ambos procedimientos triasómicos será solo otro revés en el camino a la comprensión».
languages.original_text: {n}His energy flagging, Eogunn sighs.{/n} "Yes, Nuncius, perhaps the story is indeed too long for our current circumstances. But enough of the lyrical digressions. I have since made significant progress in understanding the wisdom of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}, and the failure of both triasomia procedures will remain merely another setback on the path to comprehension."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn flaquea y suspira.{/n} «Cierto, Nuncius, tal vez la historia sea demasiado larga para las circunstancias actuales. Pero dejémonos de divagaciones. Desde entonces he avanzado considerablemente en mi entendimiento de la sabiduría del {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}, y el fracaso de ambos procedimientos triasómicos será solo otro revés en el camino a la comprensión».

languages.text: {n}気力が萎えていくなか、エオガンはため息をつく。{/n}「そうだな、ヌンキウス、確かにこの物語は今の状況には長すぎるかもしれない。だが、叙情的な脱線はもう十分だ。あれ以来、私は{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}オムニサイア{/g}の叡智を理解する上で大きな進歩を遂げた。そして、二度のトリアソミア施術の失敗も、理解へと至る道における、もう一つの躓きにすぎぬものとなるだろう。」
languages.original_text: {n}His energy flagging, Eogunn sighs.{/n} "Yes, Nuncius, perhaps the story is indeed too long for our current circumstances. But enough of the lyrical digressions. I have since made significant progress in understanding the wisdom of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}, and the failure of both triasomia procedures will remain merely another setback on the path to comprehension."

traits.locale_text: {n}気力が萎えていくなか、エオガンはため息をつく。{/n}「そうだな、ヌンキウス、確かにこの物語は今の状況には長すぎるかもしれない。だが、叙情的な脱線はもう十分だ。あれ以来、私は{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}オムニサイア{/g}の叡智を理解する上で大きな進歩を遂げた。そして、二度のトリアソミア施術の失敗も、理解へと至る道における、もう一つの躓きにすぎぬものとなるだろう。」

languages.text: {n}Enerjisi azalan Eogunn iç çekiyor.{/n} "Evet Nuncius, belki de hikâye mevcut koşullarımız için gerçekten çok uzundur. Ancak bu kadar lirik sapma yeter. O zamandan beri {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Hermesih'in{/g} bilgeliğini anlama konusunda önemli ilerleme kaydettim. Her iki üçyeközleştirme prosedürünün başarısızlığı, kavrama yolunda sadece bir başka aksilik olarak kalacak."
languages.original_text: {n}His energy flagging, Eogunn sighs.{/n} "Yes, Nuncius, perhaps the story is indeed too long for our current circumstances. But enough of the lyrical digressions. I have since made significant progress in understanding the wisdom of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}, and the failure of both triasomia procedures will remain merely another setback on the path to comprehension."

O zamandan beri {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Hermesih'in{/g} bilgeliğini anlama konusunda önemli ilerleme kaydettim. Her iki üçyeközleştirme prosedürünün başarısızlığı, kavrama yolunda sadece bir başka aksilik olarak kalacak."
